text.title: Solo Multi-Product Portfolio Management Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Solo Multi-Product Portfolio Management output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: audience cross-promo > 1 per 2 weeks per channel
stack components diverge with no plan to consolidate

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: products populated with a typed value
total_weekly_hours populated with a typed value
shared_audience_channels populated with a typed value
stack_components_shared populated with a typed value
review_quarter populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
